member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.ICompiledQuerySpec
member.summary: Defines a compiled query specification for .

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.ICompiledQuerySpec.Build(Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryBuilder@)
member.summary: Builds the query requirements into the provided builder.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IEngineAdapter
member.summary: Adapter used to bridge world data to an engine runtime.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IEntity
member.summary: Abstraction for any identifiable entity within the ECS model. Implementors must provide a unique, read-only Id property.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IEntity.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique integer identifier for this entity.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IEntity.Version
member.summary: Gets the version associated with this entity ID.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IForEach`2
member.summary: Defines a job-style iterator over two component columns.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IForEach`2.Execute(`0@,`1@)
member.summary: Executes once per matched entity.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IForEach`1
member.summary: Defines a job-style iterator over one writable component column.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IForEach`1.Execute(`0@)
member.summary: Executes once per matched entity.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IForEach`3
member.summary: Defines a job-style iterator over three component columns.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IForEach`3.Execute(`0@,`1@,`2@)
member.summary: Executes once per matched entity.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IForEach`4
member.summary: Defines a job-style iterator over four component columns.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IForEach`4.Execute(`0@,`1@,`2@,`3@)
member.summary: Executes once per matched entity.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IForEachEntity`2
member.summary: Defines a job-style iterator over two component columns with entity access.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IForEachEntity`2.Execute(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity,`0@,`1@)
member.summary: Executes once per matched entity.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IForEachEntity`1
member.summary: Defines a job-style iterator over one writable component column with entity access.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IForEachEntity`1.Execute(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity,`0@)
member.summary: Executes once per matched entity.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IForEachEntity`3
member.summary: Defines a job-style iterator over three component columns with entity access.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IForEachEntity`3.Execute(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity,`0@,`1@,`2@)
member.summary: Executes once per matched entity.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IForEachEntity`4
member.summary: Defines a job-style iterator over four component columns with entity access.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IForEachEntity`4.Execute(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity,`0@,`1@,`2@,`3@)
member.summary: Executes once per matched entity.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.ISystem
member.summary: Defines the contract for a system within the Entity Component System (ECS) framework. Implementations should encapsulate logic to operate on entities and their components during the update loop.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.ISystem.Stage
member.summary: Gets the stage this system executes in.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.ISystem.LoopPhase
member.summary: Gets the host loop phase this system executes in.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.ISystem.UpdateSettings
member.summary: Gets the update settings that control how often this system runs.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.ISystem.OnCreate(Bezoro.ECS.Services.World)
member.summary: Called once when the system is added to a world.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.ISystem.OnDestroy(Bezoro.ECS.Services.World)
member.summary: Called once when the system is removed or the world is disposed.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.ISystem.Update(Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemContext@)
member.summary: Performs the update logic for this system.
member.param: The update context for this execution.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.ISystemRunCondition
member.summary: Evaluates whether a system should run for the current scheduler pass.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.ISystemRunCondition.ShouldRun(Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemRunConditionContext@)
member.summary: Returns true when the associated system should run.
member.param: Current scheduler context for the run-condition evaluation.
member.returns: true to run; otherwise false.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld
member.summary: Represents a world context that manages entities, components, resources, and systems.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.Has``1(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity)
member.summary: Returns true if has component .

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.IsAlive(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity)
member.summary: Returns true if is alive in this world.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.TryGet``1(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity,``0@)
member.summary: Attempts to retrieve a copy of component on .
member.returns: true if the component exists; false otherwise.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.TryRead``1(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity,``0@)
member.summary: Attempts to retrieve a copy of component on .
member.returns: true if the component exists; false otherwise.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.Spawn
member.summary: Creates a new entity with no components and returns its handle.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.Spawn``1(``0@)
member.summary: Creates a new entity with one initial component and returns its handle.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.Spawn``2(``0@,``1@)
member.summary: Creates a new entity with two initial components and returns its handle.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.Spawn``3(``0@,``1@,``2@)
member.summary: Creates a new entity with three initial components and returns its handle.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.Spawn``4(``0@,``1@,``2@,``3@)
member.summary: Creates a new entity with four initial components and returns its handle.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.Get``1(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity)
member.summary: Returns a mutable reference to component on .

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.Read``1(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity)
member.summary: Returns a readonly reference to component on .

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.Write``1(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity)
member.summary: Returns a mutable reference to component on .

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.TryWrite``1(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity,Bezoro.ECS.Types.ComponentRef{``0}@)
member.summary: Attempts to retrieve a mutable reference wrapper for component .

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.GetResource``1
member.summary: Returns a reference to the registered resource of type .

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.HasResource``1
member.summary: Returns true if a resource of type is registered.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.ReadResource``1
member.summary: Returns a readonly reference to the registered resource of type .

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.WriteResource``1
member.summary: Returns a mutable reference to the registered resource of type .

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.TryReadResource``1(``0@)
member.summary: Attempts to read a copy of the registered resource of type .

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.GetOrCreateResource``1
member.summary: Gets the resource of type or creates it via the default constructor.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.Query``1
member.summary: Creates an ergonomic query view for .

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.Add``1(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity)
member.summary: Adds a default-valued component to .

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.Add``1(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity,``0@)
member.summary: Adds component with the given value to .

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.AddRelation``1(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity,Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity)
member.summary: Adds a relation of type from to .

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.Despawn(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity)
member.summary: Destroys and invalidates its handle.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.HasRelation``1(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity,Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity)
member.summary: Returns true when has relation to .

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.Remove``1(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity)
member.summary: Removes component from .

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.Replace``1(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity,``0@)
member.summary: Replaces component on .

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.RemoveRelation``1(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity,Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity)
member.summary: Removes relation from to .
member.returns: true when a relation existed and was removed; otherwise false.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.Set``1(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity,``0@)
member.summary: Sets component on to .

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.SetResource``1(``0)
member.summary: Registers or replaces the resource of type .

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.ReplaceResource``1(``0)
member.summary: Registers or replaces the resource of type .

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorld.RemoveResource``1
member.summary: Removes the resource of type if present.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorldSnapshotReader
member.summary: Defines a source that provides snapshot payloads for world restoration.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorldSnapshotReader.Read
member.summary: Returns the snapshot payload to restore.
member.returns: Snapshot data suitable for .

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorldSnapshotWriter
member.summary: Defines a sink that receives a captured world snapshot.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.IWorldSnapshotWriter.Write(Bezoro.ECS.Types.WorldSnapshot@)
member.summary: Receives a captured snapshot payload.
member.param: Snapshot data captured from a instance.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Attributes.SplitFieldsAttribute
member.summary: Marks a component as eligible for source-generated split-group storage helpers.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Attributes.SplitGroupAttribute
member.summary: Assigns a field to a split-storage group.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Attributes.SplitGroupAttribute.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Assigns a field to a split-storage group.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Attributes.SplitGroupAttribute.GroupId
member.summary: Gets the split group identifier.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Options.SnapshotDeserializationOptions
member.summary: Controls which snapshot types are allowed during world deserialization.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Options.SnapshotDeserializationOptions.Default
member.summary: Gets the default options. Snapshot types are denied by default.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Options.SnapshotDeserializationOptions.AllowAllComponentTypes
member.summary: Gets or initializes whether all component types are accepted.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Options.SnapshotDeserializationOptions.AllowAllRelationTypes
member.summary: Gets or initializes whether all relation types are accepted.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Options.SnapshotDeserializationOptions.AllowAllResourceTypes
member.summary: Gets or initializes whether all resource types are accepted.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Options.SnapshotDeserializationOptions.AllowedComponentTypes
member.summary: Gets or initializes explicit snapshot component type allowlist entries.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Options.SnapshotDeserializationOptions.AllowedRelationTypes
member.summary: Gets or initializes explicit snapshot relation type allowlist entries.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Options.SnapshotDeserializationOptions.AllowedResourceTypes
member.summary: Gets or initializes explicit snapshot resource type allowlist entries.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Options.SnapshotDeserializationOptions.TypeValidator
member.summary: Gets or initializes an additional type validator predicate. Returning false rejects the type.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Options.WorldOptions
member.summary: Configures performance-related settings for a world instance.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Options.WorldOptions.ChunkCapacity
member.summary: Gets or initializes an explicit number of entities per chunk. Set to a positive value to override byte-budget-based sizing.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Options.WorldOptions.ChunkSizeInBytes
member.summary: Gets or initializes the target chunk size in bytes used for automatic capacity calculation.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Options.WorldOptions.MaxDegreeOfParallelism
member.summary: Gets or initializes the maximum degree of parallelism for system updates.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Services.EntityManager
member.summary: Manages the lifecycle of entities within the Entity Component System (ECS).

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Services.EntityManager.AliveCount
member.summary: Gets the number of currently alive entities.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Services.EntityManager.IsAlive(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified entity is currently alive.
member.returns: true if the entity is alive; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Services.EntityManager.IsReserved(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified entity is reserved for deferred creation.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Services.EntityManager.CreateEntity
member.summary: Creates a new entity and marks it alive immediately.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Services.EntityManager.ReserveEntity
member.summary: Reserves a new entity for deferred activation.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Services.EntityManager.ActivateReservedEntity(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity)
member.summary: Activates a reserved entity.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Services.EntityManager.CancelReservedEntity(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity)
member.summary: Cancels a reserved entity without activating it.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Services.EntityManager.DestroyEntity(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity)
member.summary: Destroys the specified entity and recycles its ID for future reuse.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Services.SystemManager
member.summary: Manages system lifecycle and staged execution.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Services.World.Execute``1(Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryHandle{``0})
member.summary: Executes a compiled query and returns a cursor over all matching entities.
member.returns: A that must be disposed after use.
member.exception: Thrown when belongs to a different world. Structural world operations remain disallowed while any query cursor is active.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Services.World.GetQueryDiagnostics``1(Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryHandle{``0})
member.summary: Returns diagnostics for one compiled query handle.
member.returns: Query diagnostics snapshot.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Services.World.CaptureSnapshot``1(``0@)
member.summary: Captures a snapshot payload and forwards it to .
member.typeparam: Writer type receiving the captured payload.
member.param: Snapshot writer receiving the captured payload.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Services.World.ForEach``5(Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryHandle{``0},Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryCursor.RefInAction{``1,``2,``3,``4})
member.summary: Executes a no-allocation sequential loop over one mutable and three read-only unmanaged components.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Services.World.RestoreSnapshot``1(``0@,Bezoro.ECS.Options.SnapshotDeserializationOptions)
member.summary: Restores world state from snapshot payload supplied by .
member.typeparam: Reader type providing the snapshot payload.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Services.World.Run``6(Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryHandle{``0},``1)
member.summary: Executes a no-allocation sequential struct job over one mutable and three read-only unmanaged components.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Services.World.RunEntity``3(Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryHandle{``0},``1)
member.summary: Executes an entity-aware struct job over one mutable unmanaged component.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Services.World.RunEntity``4(Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryHandle{``0},``1)
member.summary: Executes an entity-aware struct job over one mutable and one read-only unmanaged component.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Services.World.RunEntity``5(Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryHandle{``0},``1)
member.summary: Executes an entity-aware struct job over one mutable and two read-only unmanaged components.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Services.World.RunEntity``6(Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryHandle{``0},``1)
member.summary: Executes an entity-aware struct job over one mutable and three read-only unmanaged components.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Services.World.RunParallel``3(Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryHandle{``0},``1,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Executes a struct job in parallel over one mutable unmanaged component.
member.param: Optional worker limit. When null, is used.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Services.World.RunParallel``4(Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryHandle{``0},``1,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Executes a struct job in parallel over one mutable and one read-only unmanaged component.
member.param: Optional worker limit. When null, is used.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Services.World.RunParallel``5(Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryHandle{``0},``1,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Executes a struct job in parallel over one mutable and two read-only unmanaged components.
member.param: Optional worker limit. When null, is used.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Services.World.RunParallel``6(Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryHandle{``0},``1,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Executes a struct job in parallel over one mutable and three read-only unmanaged components.
member.param: Optional worker limit. When null, is used.

member.summary: Executes an entity-aware struct job in parallel over one mutable unmanaged component.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Services.World.RunParallelEntity``4(Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryHandle{``0},``1,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Executes an entity-aware struct job in parallel over one mutable and one read-only unmanaged component.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Services.World.RunParallelEntity``5(Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryHandle{``0},``1,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Executes an entity-aware struct job in parallel over one mutable and two read-only unmanaged components.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Services.World.RunParallelEntity``6(Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryHandle{``0},``1,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Executes an entity-aware struct job in parallel over one mutable and three read-only unmanaged components.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.ArenaDiagnostics
member.summary: Immutable diagnostics for one fixed-capacity arena.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.ArenaDiagnostics.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a diagnostics snapshot.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.ArenaDiagnostics.Capacity
member.summary: Configured capacity.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.ArenaDiagnostics.HighWatermark
member.summary: Peak used slots observed.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.ArenaDiagnostics.OverflowCount
member.summary: Number of overflow attempts.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.ArenaDiagnostics.Used
member.summary: Current used slots.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.ArenaDiagnostics.Name
member.summary: Arena name.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandBuffer
member.summary: Ergonomic wrapper over the low-level command stream used during system execution.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandBuffer.#ctor(Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandStream)
member.summary: Ergonomic wrapper over the low-level command stream used during system execution.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandBuffer.GetDiagnostics
member.summary: Gets diagnostics for the underlying command storage.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandBuffer.HasCommands
member.summary: Indicates whether commands are currently recorded.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandBuffer.Spawn
member.summary: Records a deferred entity spawn.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandBuffer.CreateEntity
member.summary: Records a deferred entity spawn.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandBuffer.Spawn``1(``0@)
member.summary: Records a deferred entity spawn with one initial component.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandBuffer.CreateEntity``1(``0@)
member.summary: Records a deferred entity spawn with one initial component.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandBuffer.Despawn(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity)
member.summary: Records a deferred entity despawn.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandBuffer.Destroy(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity)
member.summary: Records a deferred entity despawn.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandBuffer.Add``1(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity,``0@)
member.summary: Records a deferred component add.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandBuffer.Replace``1(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity,``0@)
member.summary: Records a deferred component replacement.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandBuffer.Set``1(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity,``0@)
member.summary: Records a deferred component replacement.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandBuffer.Remove``1(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity)
member.summary: Records a deferred component removal.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandStream
member.summary: Fixed-capacity deferred command stream for structural mutations in .

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandStream.HasCommands
member.summary: Indicates whether commands are currently recorded.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandStream.GetDiagnostics
member.summary: Returns command-buffer diagnostics for this stream.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandStream.CreateEntity
member.summary: Records a deferred entity creation command.
member.returns: A temporary entity handle resolved during playback.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandStream.CreateEntity``1(``0@)
member.summary: Records a deferred entity creation command with one initial component value.
member.returns: A temporary entity handle resolved during playback.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandStream.Destroy(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity)
member.summary: Records a deferred destroy command.
member.remarks: If the stream is full the command is silently dropped and the overflow counter is incremented. Use to detect lost commands.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandStream.Remove``1(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity)
member.summary: Records a deferred component removal command.
member.remarks: If the stream is full the command is silently dropped and the overflow counter is incremented. Use to detect lost commands.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandStream.Reset
member.summary: Clears recorded commands while retaining allocated buffers.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandStream.Set``1(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity,``0@)
member.summary: Records a deferred unmanaged component set command.
member.remarks: If the stream or payload store is full the command is silently dropped and the overflow counter is incremented. Use to detect lost commands.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandStream.SetManaged``1(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity,``0@)
member.summary: Records a deferred managed-lane component set command.
member.remarks: If the stream or payload store is full the command is silently dropped and the overflow counter is incremented. Use to detect lost commands.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandStreamDiagnostics
member.summary: Immutable diagnostics for one instance.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandStreamDiagnostics.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Immutable diagnostics for one instance.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandStreamDiagnostics.CommandCapacity
member.summary: Configured command capacity.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandStreamDiagnostics.HighWatermark
member.summary: Peak recorded command count observed since stream creation.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandStreamDiagnostics.OverflowCount
member.summary: Number of overflow attempts.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandStreamDiagnostics.RecordedCommands
member.summary: Current recorded command count.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.ComponentAccessor`1
member.summary: Provides cached, type-stable component access for hot sequential entity loops.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.ComponentAccessor`1.Has(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified entity contains .
member.returns: true when the entity is alive and contains the component; otherwise false.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.ComponentAccessor`1.TryGet(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity,`0@)
member.summary: Tries to get a component value for the specified entity.
member.returns: true when the entity is alive and contains ; otherwise false.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.ComponentAccessor`1.Get(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity)
member.summary: Gets a mutable component reference for the specified entity.
member.returns: Mutable component reference.
member.exception: Thrown when the entity is not alive.
Thrown when the entity does not contain .

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.ComponentRef`1
member.summary: Wraps a mutable component reference returned from a non-throwing ECS API.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.ComponentRef`1.Value
member.summary: Gets the mutable component reference.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity
member.summary: Represents a unique entity within the Entity Component System (ECS). Each entity is identified by an immutable ID and version tuple.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Represents a unique entity within the Entity Component System (ECS). Each entity is identified by an immutable ID and version tuple.

member.name: F:Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity.None
member.summary: Represents an invalid entity handle.

member.name: F:Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity.Wildcard
member.summary: Represents a wildcard selector used by relationship queries.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.InputStateProxy
member.summary: Lightweight input payload passed through engine adapters.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.OnAdd`1
member.summary: Marker used with observer registration for component add events.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.OnAddObserver`1
member.summary: Observer callback invoked after a component is added or set.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.OnRemove`1
member.summary: Marker used with observer registration for component remove events.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.OnRemoveObserver`1
member.summary: Observer callback invoked before a component is removed.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.OnSetObserver`1
member.summary: Represents a callback invoked when an existing component is set during command playback.
member.param: The entity whose component was updated.
A reference to the updated component value.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryBuilder
member.summary: Builds a compiled query plan for .

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryBuilder.All``1
member.summary: Requires component type .

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryBuilder.With``1
member.summary: Requires component type .

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryBuilder.Any``1
member.summary: Requires at least one of the registered Any component types.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryBuilder.AnyOf``1
member.summary: Requires at least one of the registered AnyOf component types.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryBuilder.None``1
member.summary: Excludes component type .

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryBuilder.Without``1
member.summary: Excludes component type .

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryBuilder.Optional``1
member.summary: Registers component type as optional.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryBuilder.Added``1
member.summary: Requires component type to have been added since the previous query execution.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryBuilder.Changed``1
member.summary: Requires component type to have changed since the previous query execution.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryBuilder.Related``1(Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity)
member.summary: Requires a relationship of type to the specified .
member.param: Relationship target entity or for any target.
member.exception: Thrown when a different relation filter was already configured.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryBuilder.Related``1
member.summary: Requires a relationship of type to any target.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryCursor
member.summary: Cursor over one compiled-query execution result set.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryCursor.EntityRefAction`1
member.summary: Delegate invoked with one entity and one mutable unmanaged component.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryCursor.EntityRefInAction`4
member.summary: Delegate invoked with one entity, one mutable, and three read-only unmanaged components.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryCursor.EntityRefInAction`3
member.summary: Delegate invoked with one entity, one mutable, and two read-only unmanaged components.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryCursor.EntityRefInAction`2
member.summary: Delegate invoked with one entity, one mutable, and one read-only unmanaged component.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryCursor.RefAction`1
member.summary: Delegate invoked with one mutable unmanaged component.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryCursor.RefInAction`4
member.summary: Delegate invoked with one mutable and three read-only unmanaged components.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryCursor.RefInAction`3
member.summary: Delegate invoked with one mutable and two read-only unmanaged components.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryCursor.RefInAction`2
member.summary: Delegate invoked with one mutable and one read-only unmanaged component.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryCursor.Current
member.summary: Current matched entities.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryCursor.MoveNext
member.summary: Unlocks access to the single result batch and signals that the cursor is ready to use. This cursor exposes exactly one batch; subsequent calls return false without advancing.
member.returns: true on the first call; false on all subsequent calls.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryCursor.Get``1(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a mutable unmanaged component reference for the matched entity at .
member.param: Entity index in the current batch.
member.returns: Mutable component reference.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryCursor.Read``1(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a read-only unmanaged component reference for the matched entity at .
member.param: Entity index in the current batch.
member.returns: Read-only component reference.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryCursor.ForEach``1(Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryCursor.RefAction{``0})
member.summary: Executes a no-allocation sequential loop over one mutable unmanaged component.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryCursor.ForEach``2(Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryCursor.RefInAction{``0,``1})
member.summary: Executes a no-allocation sequential loop over one mutable and one read-only unmanaged component.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryCursor.ForEach``3(Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryCursor.RefInAction{``0,``1,``2})
member.summary: Executes a no-allocation sequential loop over one mutable and two read-only unmanaged components.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryCursor.ForEach``4(Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryCursor.RefInAction{``0,``1,``2,``3})
member.summary: Executes a no-allocation sequential loop over one mutable and three read-only unmanaged components.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryCursor.ForEachEntity``1(Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryCursor.EntityRefAction{``0})
member.summary: Executes a no-allocation sequential entity-aware loop over one mutable unmanaged component.

member.summary: Executes a no-allocation sequential entity-aware loop over one mutable and one read-only unmanaged component.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryCursor.ForEachEntity``3(Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryCursor.EntityRefInAction{``0,``1,``2})
member.summary: Executes a no-allocation sequential entity-aware loop over one mutable and two read-only unmanaged components.

member.summary: Executes a no-allocation sequential entity-aware loop over one mutable and three read-only unmanaged components.

member.summary: Executes a no-allocation sequential struct job over one mutable unmanaged component.

member.summary: Executes a no-allocation sequential struct job over one mutable and one read-only unmanaged component.

member.summary: Executes a no-allocation sequential struct job over one mutable and two read-only unmanaged components.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryDiagnostics
member.summary: Diagnostics for a compiled query plan and its current match footprint.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryDiagnostics.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Type[],System.Type[],System.Type[],System.Type[],System.Type[],System.Type[],System.Type,Bezoro.ECS.Types.Entity)
member.summary: Diagnostics for a compiled query plan and its current match footprint.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryDiagnostics.AllTypes
member.summary: Types required by the query (All, including Added/Changed promoted requirements).

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryDiagnostics.AnyTypes
member.summary: Additional Any filter types.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryDiagnostics.ArchetypeCacheVersion
member.summary: Current plan archetype cache version.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryDiagnostics.AddedTypes
member.summary: Incremental Added filter types.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryDiagnostics.ChangedTypes
member.summary: Incremental Changed filter types.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryDiagnostics.IsArchetypeCacheUpToDate
member.summary: Indicates whether the query archetype cache matches current world archetype version.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryDiagnostics.MatchingArchetypeCount
member.summary: Number of archetypes matching static query filters.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryDiagnostics.MatchingChunkCount
member.summary: Number of chunk ranges matching dynamic + static filters for this diagnostics snapshot.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryDiagnostics.MatchingEntityCount
member.summary: Number of entities matching dynamic + static filters for this diagnostics snapshot.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryDiagnostics.NoneTypes
member.summary: Excluded None filter types.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryDiagnostics.OptionalTypes
member.summary: Optional component types registered in the query.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryDiagnostics.RelatedRelationType
member.summary: Relation filter relation type, if configured.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryDiagnostics.RelatedTarget
member.summary: Relation target for .

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryHandle`1
member.summary: Immutable handle for a compiled query specification.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryView`1
member.summary: Ergonomic query wrapper that hides the single-batch cursor ceremony.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryView`1.#ctor(Bezoro.ECS.Services.World,Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryHandle{`0})
member.summary: Ergonomic query wrapper that hides the single-batch cursor ceremony.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryView`1.EntityAction
member.summary: Delegate invoked for each matching entity.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryView`1.EntityInAction`1
member.summary: Delegate invoked for each matching entity with one read-only component.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryView`1.EntityRefAction`1
member.summary: Delegate invoked for each matching entity with one mutable unmanaged component.

member.summary: Delegate invoked for each matching entity with one mutable and two read-only unmanaged components.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryView`1.EntityRefInAction`4
member.summary: Delegate invoked for each matching entity with one mutable and three read-only unmanaged components.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryView`1.Any
member.summary: Returns true when any entity matches the query.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.QueryView`1.Count
member.summary: Counts matching entities.

member.summary: Executes an entity-only loop over the current query results.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.ScheduleBatchDiagnostics
member.summary: Describes a scheduled system batch within a stage.
member.param: Zero-based batch index within the stage.
System types scheduled in this batch.
Indicates whether this batch contains an exclusive system.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.ScheduleBatchDiagnostics.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Type[],System.Boolean)
member.summary: Describes a scheduled system batch within a stage.
member.param: Zero-based batch index within the stage.
System types scheduled in this batch.
Indicates whether this batch contains an exclusive system.

member.summary: Gets the zero-based batch index within the stage.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.ScheduleBatchDiagnostics.ContainsExclusiveSystem
member.summary: Gets whether this batch contains an exclusive system.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.ScheduleBatchDiagnostics.SystemTypes
member.summary: Gets the system types scheduled in this batch.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.ScheduleDiagnostics
member.summary: Snapshot of scheduler plan structure for diagnostics and tooling.
member.param: Number of times the execution plan has been rebuilt.
Phase diagnostics in scheduler execution order.

member.summary: Snapshot of scheduler plan structure for diagnostics and tooling.
member.param: Number of times the execution plan has been rebuilt.

member.summary: Gets number of times the execution plan has been rebuilt.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.ScheduleDiagnostics.Phases
member.summary: Gets phase diagnostics in scheduler execution order.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.ScheduleDiagnostics.RegisteredSystemCount
member.summary: Gets number of registered systems.

Stage diagnostics for this loop phase.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.Stage
member.summary: Defines the ordered execution stages for systems.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemContext
member.summary: Provides context for a system update execution.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: The elapsed time passed to this system update.
The world instance executing this context.
The command buffer for deferred structural changes.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemContext.#ctor(System.Single,Bezoro.ECS.Types.Stage,Bezoro.ECS.Services.World,Bezoro.ECS.Types.CommandBuffer)
member.summary: Provides context for a system update execution.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: The elapsed time passed to this system update.
The world instance executing this context.
The command buffer for deferred structural changes.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemContext.Commands
member.summary: Gets the command buffer for deferred structural changes.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemContext.DeltaTime
member.summary: Gets the elapsed time passed to this system update.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemContext.Stage
member.summary: Gets the stage currently being executed.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemContext.World
member.summary: Gets the world instance executing this context.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemLoopPhase
member.summary: Defines the host loop phase that dispatches a system update.

member.name: F:Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemLoopPhase.Tick
member.summary: Executes during the host's regular tick loop.

member.name: F:Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemLoopPhase.FixedTick
member.summary: Executes during the host's fixed-timestep tick loop.

member.name: F:Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemLoopPhase.LateTick
member.summary: Executes during the host's late tick loop.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemMetadata
member.summary: Generated or static metadata for a system type.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemMetadata.#ctor(System.Type,System.Type[],System.Type[],System.Type[],System.Type[],System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generated or static metadata for a system type.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemRunConditionContext
member.summary: Provides context for system run-condition evaluation.
member.param: World executing the current scheduler pass.
Loop phase for the current scheduler pass.
Stage for the current scheduler pass.
Delta time for the current scheduler pass.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemRunConditionContext.#ctor(Bezoro.ECS.Services.World,Bezoro.ECS.Abstractions.ISystem,Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemLoopPhase,Bezoro.ECS.Types.Stage,System.Single)
member.summary: Provides context for system run-condition evaluation.
member.param: World executing the current scheduler pass.
Loop phase for the current scheduler pass.
Stage for the current scheduler pass.
Delta time for the current scheduler pass.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemRunConditionContext.DeltaTime
member.summary: Gets the delta time for the current scheduler pass.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemRunConditionContext.LoopPhase
member.summary: Gets the loop phase for the current scheduler pass.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemRunConditionContext.Stage
member.summary: Gets the stage for the current scheduler pass.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemRunConditionContext.System
member.summary: Gets the system currently being evaluated.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemRunConditionContext.World
member.summary: Gets the world executing the current scheduler pass.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemUpdateSettings
member.summary: Defines how frequently a system should run.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemUpdateSettings.#ctor(System.Single)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: The minimum interval, in seconds, between updates. Use 0 for every update.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemUpdateSettings.EveryTick
member.summary: Gets settings for systems that run every tick.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemUpdateSettings.IntervalSeconds
member.summary: Gets the minimum interval, in seconds, between updates.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemUpdateSettings.FixedInterval(System.Single)
member.summary: Creates settings for a fixed update interval.
member.param: The minimum interval, in seconds, between updates.
member.returns: The configured update settings.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemUpdateSettings.FixedInterval(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Creates settings for a fixed update interval.
member.returns: The configured update settings.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemUpdateSettings.FixedInterval(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates settings for a fixed update interval.
member.param: The minimum interval, in milliseconds, between updates.
member.returns: The configured update settings.

member.name: M:Bezoro.ECS.Types.SystemUpdateSettings.FixedInterval(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Creates settings for a fixed update interval.
member.param: The minimum interval, in milliseconds, between updates.
member.returns: The configured update settings.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.WorldConfig
member.summary: Configures fixed capacities and overflow policy for .

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.WorldConfig.ChunkCapacity
member.summary: Number of entity rows per archetype chunk in .

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.WorldConfig.CommandCapacity
member.summary: Maximum number of commands recordable in one instance.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.WorldConfig.CommandPayloadCapacityPerType
member.summary: Maximum payload entries per component type in a command stream.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.WorldConfig.ComponentTypeCapacity
member.summary: Maximum number of registered component types.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.WorldConfig.EntityCapacity
member.summary: Maximum number of alive + recyclable entity slots.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.WorldConfig.MaxDegreeOfParallelism
member.summary: Maximum degree of parallelism for system execution.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.WorldConfig.QueryResultCapacity
member.summary: Maximum number of entities returned by one query execution.

member.name: P:Bezoro.ECS.Types.WorldConfig.OverflowPolicy
member.summary: Overflow policy used by fixed-capacity buffers.

member.summary: Point-in-time diagnostics for memory arenas.

member.summary: Entity slot diagnostics.

member.summary: Query result buffer diagnostics.

member.name: T:Bezoro.ECS.Types.WorldOverflowPolicy
member.summary: Defines overflow handling behavior for fixed-capacity world buffers.

member.name: F:Bezoro.ECS.Types.WorldOverflowPolicy.FailFast
member.summary: Throws immediately when a configured capacity is exceeded.

member.name: F:Bezoro.ECS.Types.WorldOverflowPolicy.DropNewest
member.summary: Drops the newest item when capacity is exceeded.
